summary: Tested Clone Product feature (backend + frontend) and ProductForm spacing fix in Pricing tab. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Clone button visible in products table, clone creates product with '_cloned' suffix and Inactive status. ProductForm spacing (gap-6 = 24px) working correctly across all pricing types and dark mode.

issues: PricingTypeSelector component has mb-5 (20px) inside its grid div AND the parent flex container uses gap-6 (24px), resulting in 44px combined gap between the checkout type buttons and the next card. This is visually acceptable but slightly over-spaced. Not a blocker.

For 'Test FAQ Service', none of the three pricing type buttons (Internal/External/Enquiry) appeared highlighted on initial page load. This is a pre-existing data issue where the product's pricing_type field has an unexpected stored value (not null, empty, 'internal', 'external', or 'enquiry'). After clicking 'Internal Checkout' it works correctly.

clone_feature_verification.clone_button_in_table: ✅ Clone button appears next to Edit button in every product row (data-testid='admin-clone-{id}')
clone_feature_verification.clone_name_suffix: ✅ Cloned product name appends '_cloned' (e.g. 'Accounting Service' → 'Accounting Service_cloned')
clone_feature_verification.clone_is_inactive: ✅ Cloned product has Inactive status with red badge
clone_feature_verification.clone_new_id: ✅ Cloned product has a new unique ID
clone_feature_verification.original_unchanged: ✅ Original product remains unchanged after cloning
clone_feature_verification.list_refresh: ✅ Products list automatically refreshes after clone (count: 11 → 12)

spacing_verification.section_container: flex flex-col gap-6 = 24px gap between sections ✅
spacing_verification.card_container: flex flex-col gap-5 = 20px gap within cards ✅
spacing_verification.checkout_type_to_billing_card: 44px total gap (24px flex gap + 20px PricingTypeSelector internal mb-5) - visually good ✅
spacing_verification.billing_card_to_intake_section: Visible gap between billing card and intake questions section ✅
spacing_verification.external_pricing_type: Clean gaps between checkout selector → External URL card → T&C card ✅
spacing_verification.enquiry_pricing_type: Clean gaps between checkout selector → Enquiry section → T&C card ✅

dark_mode_verification.all_sections_readable: ✅ All pricing form sections readable in dark mode
dark_mode_verification.gaps_visible_in_dark_mode: ✅ Spacing between sections clearly visible in dark mode

critical_code_review_comments: PricingTypeSelector grid has mb-5 which adds extra bottom margin on top of the parent gap-6 = total 44px. Minor double-spacing but visually acceptable.

Test FAQ Service product may have an unexpected pricing_type value in DB (not internal/external/enquiry), causing no pricing type button to be pre-selected. May need data migration or a fallback in the UI to handle unknown pricing_type values.
seed_data_creation: Multiple 'Test FAQ Service_cloned' and 'Accounting Service_cloned' products created during testing (all Inactive)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clone product feature fully working: POST /api/admin/products/{id}/clone creates product with '_cloned' suffix and is_active=False. Clone button (data-testid='admin-clone-{id}') appears in every product row next to Edit. ProductForm Pricing tab spacing uses flex flex-col gap-6 (24px) on section container and flex flex-col gap-5 (20px) on cards. Dark mode works correctly. Admin login: admin@automateaccounts.local/ChangeMe123! (no partner code needed for platform_super_admin). COMMERCE section in sidebar → Products.
